app.name: Fyntra
app.tagline: Parent peace of mind. School operational ease.

login.heading: Sign in to Fyntra

phoneStep.body: Enter your phone number to receive a one-time code.
phoneStep.invalidPhone: Enter a valid Pakistani mobile number (starts with +92, 12 digits total).

errors.unknownPhone: That phone number is not registered. Please contact your school.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

login.demoHint: Demo: any 4-digit code works. Try +923001000001 (parent), +923001100001 (admin), or +923001200001 (teacher).

roleHome.placeholder: Real content lands here in upcoming steps.
